---
title: "Smart Tables HTML"
format: html
filters:
  - quarto
  - ../_extensions/smart-typst-tables/smart-typst-tables.lua
smart-tables:
  profile: academic
  table-width: natural
  align: center
  stripe: true
---

## Caption and Cross-Reference

::: {#tbl-html-schedule}

| Workstream | Start date | Review date | Planned hours | On-time rate | Notes |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Discovery | 2026-01-06 | 2026-01-20 | 80 | 91.0% | Stable delivery with a few integration delays. |
| Prototype | 2026-01-21 | 2026-02-18 | 160 | 88.5% | Batch validation adds some review time. |
| Pilot | 2026-02-19 | 2026-03-11 | 120 | 94.2% | Small queue and fast feedback loops. |

HTML schedule summary.
:::

See @tbl-html-schedule.

## Compact Override

::: {smart-tables-profile="compact" smart-tables-width="full" smart-tables-stripe="false"}
| Criterion | Weight | What a complete answer should include |
|---|---:|---|
| Scope | 20% | Defines the workstream, owner, and expected deliverable. |
| Evidence | 30% | Uses dates, counts, and rates to support the conclusion. |
| Interpretation | 35% | Explains the operational meaning of the trend or exception. |
| Communication | 15% | Presents the result with clear labels and units. |
:::

## Opt-Out

::: {smart-tables="false"}
| A | B |
|---|---|
| This table | is left unchanged |
:::
